message:
The other day, I decided it was time to finally put together a go-bag for emergencies. You know, the kind that’s supposed to have everything you need in a pinch? So, I gathered snacks, water, and even a couple of old photos—because, why not? 

Fast forward to me, proudly showing off my handiwork to my partner. As I opened the bag, I realized I forgot the most important part: the actual emergency documents! Just a bag full of granola bars and memories. 

We both laughed, but it was a good reminder that being prepared doesn’t have to be perfect; it just needs to happen. A little organization goes a long way, and hey, at least we’ll be well-fed in a pinch! 

Have you ever had a ‘not-so-ready’ moment that turned into a funny story?
